settings.title: Monster Piercing | Gold Barbells
settings.text:
Explore our stunning collection of Gold Barbells, featuring Curved, Circular (CBB) and Straight designs crafted from high quality 9K and 14K Gold. Each piece is designed for lasting comfort, secure wear and a timeless shine that complements any piercing.

This range includes plain gold barbells for a sleek, classic look, as well as CZ studded curved and straight barbells set with sparkling clear and coloured cubic zirconia stones. With a variety of designs to suit every style, from subtle minimal pieces to radiant birthstone-inspired options, these barbells bring elegance and versatility to your collection.

Perfect for both new and healed piercings, our Gold Barbells combine strength, beauty and premium craftsmanship for everyday comfort and long lasting brilliance.

settings.question: Are your gold barbells made from real gold?
settings.answer: Yes. All our barbells are made from solid 14K gold – never plated, filled, or vermeil. Each piece is designed for comfort, durability, and a polished finish that retains its shine over time.

settings.question: What types of barbells do you offer in gold?
settings.answer: We offer a selection of 14K gold barbells, including straight barbells, curved barbells, and circular barbells (horseshoes). These are suitable for various piercings such as tongue, nipple, eyebrow, ear, and intimate piercings. We also offer curved barbells in 9K Gold.

settings.question: Are the gold barbells internally threaded or threadless?
settings.answer: All our 14K gold barbells are internally threaded to ensure smooth insertion and maximum comfort.

settings.question: Do you offer wholesale pricing for gold barbells?
settings.answer: Yes. We supply 14K gold barbells to piercing studios and retailers at competitive wholesale rates. Please log in or contact our wholesale team for trade pricing and availability.
